reviews.review_msg:
She is a very nice and encouraging teacher.
As for the exam, she focuses on assessing your ability to explain real world problems in terms of the concepts she taught in her class, not just memorizing formulas and definitions. You really need to understand the key concepts thoroughly and to be able to apply them practically to do well in her class.

I took this one year ago. You don't need to read the e-book, but you MUST purchase it because you have to subscribe to the e-book to have access to the quizzes that are worth your grade. The final exam was a disaster where the difficulty and relevancy to the course were questionable. Even doubt whether those questions are generated by ChatGPT.

You get graded on 2 midterms, 1 final, and a set of online quizzes. All are worth 25% each. The content taught in class is basic however exam questions are not at the same level. Quizzes are strenuous and the course is not well organized. You HAVE to take notes in class and there are no office hours available. I Would not suggest this professor.

Need to do your two assignments correctly (only P/F), and each 10% I lose 10% for assignment 1, that the reason why even I got good score in every exam, I couldn't get a better grade. Content is always easy, compare to the other Prof in FIC, but you still need to work hard as well. At least, no many students in her class join the cram school.

Vera is a nice prof definitely. Everyone got 100% for the online quizzes, only counts your highest score. Try it once, then refresh all your score before the final. If you refresh it too early, you can't make a good use of the study plan, which could be in the exam. She always pops some questions to let us think. Easiest Econ content in FIC.

Vera is very nice and sweet. I love how she always congratulates students on their exams and encourages them to work harder next time. Her lecture slides are not so organized, but it doesn't affect that much. Her quizzes are online and similar to the exams so if you work hard at home, it will pay off. Definitely a good prof!

Vera is the best economics instructor that I ever met!! She's patient, friendly and sweet. She can explain some obscure concepts in an interesting way. Besides, she always encourages students to keep up. I am so appreciative that I met such a nice instructor even though ECON is just my elective course. I can't get B+ without her!!

Vera is very kind and easy to approach. However, her class is different from her exams a lot. If you work hard, I think you will get a good grade. And her class is all hand-writing, it is better to take all classes. Her homework is online and if you do the practice before finishing all the assignments, you will get good marks.

Vera Lantinova is definitely one of the kindest professors Ive met so far. She is quite calm and has a soothing voice (which is sometimes a little bit too low), so listening to her is very pleasant. She definitely knows the subjects she is talking about and she is passionate about them. Definitely taking macroeconomics with her next!
she teach so simple in class and exams oh my God dammnn tough!!!
Her voice is pretty low but if you sit closer to her,it wont be a problem. Most of her lecture were writen in the board so dont skip class. Detail explaination and she is very nice.
Her voice is low. You need to take many notes. But her notes are very clear and useful towards exams. She won't give questions beyond what you have learned. Better than expectations.
Her exams were easy. Low voice but really nice.
easy course with easier exams, she voice is so low. needed to pay more attention.

She is extremely helpful, explains very well and gives helpful in-class exercise for practice on what you are learning. her exams are easy/fair, nothing you haven't learned. I would definitely recommend her.

Suck teacher....she better to learn more about economic...she doesn't preparing any stuff for the class.... always did something wrong on the class....She is very sick of english skill...hard to understand...really don't know what she talking about on the midterm paper...try to avoid her if you guys can.....Really sucks.....

Try to avoid this class if you can. Although the workload is relatively light, earning high marks is quite hard. There are two assignments both of which the class average was around 60%. Full participation marks were hard to achieve Lectures are definitely rushed and the textbook is useless for exam review. Also 75 % is a C+.Dreading the final now.

She's not tech savvy in the least - her mic is practically off and whenever it is on, the Russian accent makes it tougher still. Despite that, she is an easy-going prof with tests based on her lectures. Attend class, take notes, and you'll do fine.
Good marker, knows her stuff. However, is very hard to hear and she doesn't really know how to help people...

Please ignore the negative comments below.  If you can't do well in this course you shouldn't be in uni. The exams are not bad but she is a very fair marker so that makes them a lot easier, and she marks assignments easy too.  She is very interested in the course material and encourages question, not to mention she has a great sense of humor.
All round great!
couldn't ever hear what she said in the lecture, so students including myself lost interest
Avoid her if you have other chances. BAD BAD prof ever!!!
Worst class taken at SFU. Not happy with the prof, very negative.

The only problem with this prof is that most of the time she is very hard to hear because she have a partial Russian accent and she mumbles and she does not know how to use the mic properly. On exams she is average not hard nor easy. People complain because they don't pay attention and play with their laptops. But she is helpful if you ask her Q's.
bad bad prof, so mean by the way
She always ask questions out of the textbook, i have no clue her  2 midterms, even final is hard. Her sense of humor Avoid her, otherwise you will get stuck in this course.
really dont konw what she's talking about

wow, so mean & rude when she talks to people in office hours! mayb cuz its not recorded anymore! when u ask her to clarify smth u dont understand, she says, "u tell me" ..ok, i dont understand clearly, that is y i ask u, dr.Vera! MT is too hard & tricky! VERA, PLEASE READ CAREFULY, this is the ..ONLY & FIRST STATS.. course IS & POL majors take!!

Lectures are too fast-paced and hard to keep up. Tells me to either read my textbook or that the fact that I will be able to catch up later on and not to worry. It is especially annoying when students are starting to understand a slide but then she immediately jumps to the next one without giving people TIME to UNDERSTAND the concepts. Too rushed!

class is easy to follow, interesting and Vera is quite funny.  She is very accommodating with attendance issues and is a good marker - if she thinks you understand the material, and you show up and participate in tutorials, it will be reflected in your mark.  Would definitely take another class of hers.

even though i bombed in the final and got a really low mark which i'd never thought of, frankly she is helpful and approachable in her office hour and at least trying to be nice to the students. Just had no idea why she is so picky on the marks and failed so many ppl.
Sh's pretty knowlegable. has a deep understanding of the concepts
Her strength is to fail more than half of the stduents in the final. I bet her to use the curve, but surprsingly she DOE NOT know what it is. As I know, the highest grade in this course was B-
Just one sentence: AVOID HER!!!!!!!!!!!!

Nice prof, but having the class late on Fridays and it being stats wasn't fun.  The labs are kind of fun, you get to diddle with a computer program.  And it's a class that is geared for people who AREN'T math people (IS) so if you do the work, and ask for help from Vera you can do just fine!

I took this course hoping to get a good grade. OBVIOSLY, i failed the final exam and got a c- for the overall grade even thought i got full marks on all quiz and 70% midterm. Lets just say, she cant teach. After all the downs, i gained nothing from the lecture. The only thing i find useful is the notes. Useless textbook. AVOID taking this prof.
The materials are not hard but her talking is sleepy and marks very picky

she is the worst prof i ever met insfu so far. she is afraid of communicating with ta resulting in the incredibly huge mark gap between her tut and others. also, she is useless at all for learning economics and your grade. finally, she is always nervous on the lecture due to lacking the experiences.

Vera is a helpful teacher who is easily approachable and who wants her students to do well. She has a wicked sense of humor and shes sexy as hell! Some of the comments below seem to reveal some questionable use of the English language. I wonder if that has anything to do with their comprehension...?

Only good thing was light course(useless textbook used only for 1 simple Asmt) and easy marks for quizzes. Final exam avg was ~67%, and she was pretty helpful if you went to her office. Didn't like the way grades were given though(83-86: B+, 86-87: A-,86-94:A,94+: A+). Long answers on final were marked fairly, but lost 5 mks for every wrong T/F.

I took Econ102 with Vera last semester, I studied hard and I guess it was only the people who know a lot of Econ did well in the class. Even if I sit in the front roll, I cannot hear what the prof is talking about. The class average were basically a C+ to B range
You can get a low grade you've never thought of.

Very horrible prof. avoid at all cost. I took this course with Econ105 & 103 knowledge and i ended with a C grade. I did 80% on midterm where the class avg was 60%. Final i thot wsa rly easy, but I guess I bombed it? since i got a C. Everyone bombed it so she said. She failed a bunch of ppl. You'd think no pro would fail half the class? thnk again.
you can get a lowest grade you've never seen.

Not an easy prof. Speaks with accent but understandable. MT was 25 MC @ 2.5pts and 5 SA @ 10pts, class avg was 60%. Final was 5 TF @ 5pts and 5 SA @ 10pts, not sure about class avg but many people bombed the final and many people failed the course and this is supposed to be a 100 course. Be careful when taking classes with this prof.

Can't hear what she says during the lecture,eventhough I was sitting in the front. Mid term was not so difficult but final exam was tricky. I got F which was totally unexpected and I was shocked! I got 70% for mid and I study hard for final which was I thought I did ok.Lots of student bombed in this course!!
She had some pretty hilarious jokes and cartoons! One of my favourite profs so far.
i found her very difficult to understand in class. She has a strong accent and speaks very quietly.
She is very nice but Final Exam was very difficult.
